tools.name: fuotaTasks.associateMulticastGroupWithFuotaTask
tools.description: Associate a multicast group with a FUOTA task.

tools.description: Associate a wireless device with a FUOTA task.

tools.description: Creates a FUOTA task.

tools.name: fuotaTasks.deleteFuotaTask
tools.description: Deletes a FUOTA task.

tools.name: fuotaTasks.disassociateMulticastGroupFromFuotaTask
tools.description: Disassociates a multicast group from a fuota task.

tools.name: fuotaTasks.disassociateWirelessDeviceFromFuotaTask
tools.description: Disassociates a wireless device from a FUOTA task.

tools.name: fuotaTasks.getFuotaTask
tools.description: Gets information about a FUOTA task.

tools.name: fuotaTasks.listFuotaTasks
tools.description: Lists the FUOTA tasks registered to your AWS account.

tools.name: fuotaTasks.listMulticastGroupsByFuotaTask
tools.description: List all multicast groups associated with a fuota task.

tools.name: logLevels.getLogLevelsByResourceTypes
tools.description: Returns current default log levels or log levels by resource types. Based on resource types, log levels can be for wireless device log options or wireless gateway log options.

tools.name: logLevels.getResourceLogLevel
tools.description: Fetches the log-level override, if any, for a given resource-ID and resource-type. It can be used for a wireless device or a wireless gateway.

tools.name: logLevels.putResourceLogLevel
tools.description: Sets the log-level override for a resource-ID and resource-type. This option can be specified for a wireless gateway or a wireless device. A limit of 200 log level override can be set per account.

tools.name: logLevels.resetAllResourceLogLevels
tools.description: Removes the log-level overrides for all resources; both wireless devices and wireless gateways.

tools.name: logLevels.resetResourceLogLevel
tools.description: Removes the log-level override, if any, for a specific resource-ID and resource-type. It can be used for a wireless device or a wireless gateway.

tools.name: logLevels.updateLogLevelsByResourceTypes
tools.description: Set default log level, or log levels by resource types. This can be for wireless device log options or wireless gateways log options and is used to control the log messages that'll be displayed in CloudWatch.

tools.name: multicastGroups.associateWirelessDeviceWithMulticastGroup
tools.description: Associates a wireless device with a multicast group.

tools.name: multicastGroups.cancelMulticastGroupSession
tools.description: Cancels an existing multicast group session.

tools.name: multicastGroups.createMulticastGroup
tools.description: Creates a multicast group.

tools.name: multicastGroups.deleteMulticastGroup
tools.description: Deletes a multicast group if it is not in use by a fuota task.

tools.name: multicastGroups.disassociateWirelessDeviceFromMulticastGroup
tools.description: Disassociates a wireless device from a multicast group.

tools.name: multicastGroups.getMulticastGroup
tools.description: Gets information about a multicast group.

tools.name: multicastGroups.getMulticastGroupSession
tools.description: Gets information about a multicast group session.

tools.name: multicastGroups.listMulticastGroups
tools.description: Lists the multicast groups registered to your AWS account.

tools.name: multicastGroups.sendDataToMulticastGroup
tools.description: Sends the specified data to a multicast group.

tools.name: multicastGroups.startBulkAssociateWirelessDeviceWithMulticastGroup
tools.description: Starts a bulk association of all qualifying wireless devices with a multicast group.

tools.name: multicastGroups.startBulkDisassociateWirelessDeviceFromMulticastGroup
tools.description: Starts a bulk disassociatin of all qualifying wireless devices from a multicast group.

tools.name: multicastGroups.startMulticastGroupSession
tools.description: Starts a multicast group session.

tools.name: multicastGroups.updateMulticastGroup
tools.description: Updates properties of a multicast group session.

tools.name: networkAnalyzerConfigurations.createNetworkAnalyzerConfiguration
tools.description: Creates a new network analyzer configuration.

tools.description: Deletes a network analyzer configuration.

tools.description: Get network analyzer configuration.

tools.name: networkAnalyzerConfigurations.listNetworkAnalyzerConfigurations
tools.description: Lists the network analyzer configurations.

tools.name: networkAnalyzerConfigurations.updateNetworkAnalyzerConfiguration
tools.description: Update network analyzer configuration.

tools.name: partnerAccounts.associateAwsAccountWithPartnerAccount
tools.description: Associates a partner account with your AWS account.

tools.name: partnerAccounts.disassociateAwsAccountFromPartnerAccount
tools.description: Disassociates your AWS account from a partner account. If PartnerAccountId and PartnerType are null, disassociates your AWS account from all partner accounts.

tools.name: partnerAccounts.getPartnerAccount
tools.description: Gets information about a partner account. If PartnerAccountId and PartnerType are null, returns all partner accounts.

tools.name: partnerAccounts.listPartnerAccounts
tools.description: Lists the partner accounts associated with your AWS account.

tools.name: partnerAccounts.updatePartnerAccount
tools.description: Updates properties of a partner account.

tools.name: positionConfigurations.getPositionConfiguration
tools.description:
Get position configuration for a given resource.

This action is no longer supported. Calls to retrieve the position configuration should use the GetResourcePosition API operation instead.

tools.name: positionConfigurations.listPositionConfigurations
tools.description:
List position configurations for a given resource, such as positioning solvers.

This action is no longer supported. Calls to retrieve position information should use the GetResourcePosition API operation instead.

tools.name: positionConfigurations.putPositionConfiguration
tools.description:
Put position configuration for a given resource.

This action is no longer supported. Calls to update the position configuration should use the UpdateResourcePosition API operation instead.

tools.name: positionEstimate.getPositionEstimate
tools.description: Get estimated position information as a payload in GeoJSON format. The payload measurement data is resolved using solvers that are provided by third-party vendors.

tools.name: positions.getPosition
tools.description:
Get the position information for a given resource.

This action is no longer supported. Calls to retrieve the position information should use the GetResourcePosition API operation instead.

tools.name: positions.updatePosition
tools.description:
Update the position information of a resource.

This action is no longer supported. Calls to update the position information should use the UpdateResourcePosition API operation instead.

tools.name: resourcePositions.getResourcePosition
tools.description: Get the position information for a given wireless device or a wireless gateway resource. The position information uses the World Geodetic System (WGS84).

tools.name: resourcePositions.updateResourcePosition
tools.description: Update the position information of a given wireless device or a wireless gateway resource. The position coordinates are based on the World Geodetic System (WGS84).

tools.name: serviceEndpoint.getServiceEndpoint
tools.description: Gets the account-specific endpoint for Configuration and Update Server (CUPS) protocol or LoRaWAN Network Server (LNS) connections.

tools.name: serviceProfiles.createServiceProfile
tools.description: Creates a new service profile.

tools.name: serviceProfiles.deleteServiceProfile
tools.description: Deletes a service profile.

tools.name: serviceProfiles.getServiceProfile
tools.description: Gets information about a service profile.

tools.name: serviceProfiles.listServiceProfiles
tools.description: Lists the service profiles registered to your AWS account.

tools.name: tagsResourceArn.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the tags (metadata) you have assigned to the resource.

tools.name: tagsResourceArn.tagResource
tools.description: Adds a tag to a resource.

tools.name: tagsResourceArnTagKeys.untagResource
tools.description: Removes one or more tags from a resource.

tools.name: wirelessDeviceImportTask.updateWirelessDeviceImportTask
tools.description: Update an import task to add more devices to the task.

tools.description: List the Sidewalk devices in an import task and their onboarding status.

tools.name: wirelessDeviceImportTasks.listWirelessDeviceImportTasks
tools.description: List wireless devices that have been added to an import task.
